overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running along a dirt path through rural grasslands and marshy terrain on a bright spring morning. The character moves steadily through an atmospheric landscape with dynamic lighting and detailed vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: distant castle structure becomes visible on the left horizon as the path opens up

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the dirt path with swords strapped to his back, moving through the grassy hillside

entered.detail: grass-covered rocky outcrop with patches of wildflowers
narrow dirt path winding through the grassland
open meadow with tall green grass and scattered wildflowers
medieval stone fortress visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a dirt trail through an open grassland hillside. Rocky outcrops line the right side while a vast meadow stretches to the left. Around the 11-second mark, a distant castle becomes visible on the horizon as the terrain opens up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with stone boundary wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues running along the path, passing by a large oak tree and following the trail as it curves slightly

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path on the right side
mature oak tree with spreading branches providing partial shade

segments.scene_description: The path continues through open grassland with a stone wall appearing on the right. A large oak tree provides shade as Geralt runs past, and the distant castle remains visible on the left while the rocky hillside fades behind.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dry dirt to muddy marsh with standing water

agents.ego_description: Geralt splashing through the increasingly muddy path, navigating the marshy terrain with wooden fences on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and rails marking the path boundary
decaying logs lying in the tall grass beside the path
tall reeds and wetland plants growing in the damp soil

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a marshy wetland as the path becomes muddy and wet. Wooden fence posts line the right side while tall marsh vegetation grows on the left. The stone wall fades into the distance as Geralt continues running through the damp terrain toward the distant forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt runs from an open, rocky hillside into a damp, marshy wetland. It begins with a steady pace along a dirt trail through vast grasslands, where rocky outcrops line the right side and a distant castle emerges on the horizon. As the terrain opens further, the rocky hillside fades and is replaced by a stone wall and a large, shading oak tree. The scene then shifts as the path becomes muddy and wet, transitioning the landscape into a wetland filled with tall marsh vegetation and wooden fence posts. Finally, the stone wall disappears into the distance as the camera follows Geralt through the damp terrain toward a far-off forest.
